name: combo-box
visual_summary: The combo-box component is a dropdown menu that allows users to select one value from a list of options. It's commonly used in forms or when selecting settings. This component is ideal when you need to provide users with a list of options and require a single selection.
generation_prompt:
Create a production-ready form component with the following characteristics:

Name: combo-box
Description: The combo-box component is a dropdown menu that allows users to select one value from a list of options. It's commonly used in forms or when selecting settings. This component is ideal when you need to provide users with a list of options and require a single selection.
Style: e.g. material, flat-design
Interactions: e.g. animated, scrollable
Tags: dropdown, select, menu, options

Requirements:
- Works in React with TypeScript by default but adaptable to Vue, Svelte, or plain HTML/CSS
- Uses Tailwind CSS for styling
- Fully accessible with ARIA labels and keyboard navigation
- Responsive and mobile-friendly
- No external dependencies beyond React and Tailwind unless necessary
- Include all necessary imports
- Export as default with sensible prop types

Generate clean production-ready code only. No explanations.
Reference implementation (adapt don't copy):
